summary: Extracted a shared SanctionedGitCommit (pathspec-scoped commit + skip-unstageable + add/commit lock-retry) that both DotiReconcileCommit and BugReleaseDocCommit delegate to (A/B/F/HIGH); excluded gitignored .doti/templates from install commit-candidates at the source (B); surfaced doti install's failed commit as Integrity (C); made update-all buckets mutually exclusive (E); bounded-token release-doc slug match (G); re-check test-evidence + fault-isolate malformed records + HEAD-reachable tag in the release train (H/I/J); + the missing regression tests (pre-staged sweep, gitignored templates, untracked orphan, bounded slug, evidence-free pass, truncated record, unmerged tag).
